title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Fortis Healthcare Global Group

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Fortis Healthcare Global Group
jsonLd.description:
We at Fortis Healthcare Global Group are looking for an experienced Radiologist based out of Mysuru. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Fortis Healthcare Global Group:
Fortis Healthcare Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fortis Healthcare Global Group!
